gt_sql: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T2.category = 'Parking' AND T3.cost < (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)
pred_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE b.category = 'Parking'
  AND b.spent < (
    SELECT AVG(spent)
    FROM budget
    WHERE category = 'Parking'
  );
question: List the name of events with less than average parking cost.
